_comment: Documentation-only fields such as _comment and _param_help are ignored by the code.

_param_help.n_items: Number of 2D points generated before Spark distributes them.
_param_help.n_partitions: Number of Spark partitions used for the distributed KD-tree build.
_param_help.n_point_queries: Number of exact point queries to run in the distributed benchmark.
_param_help.n_queries: Number of rectangle range queries to run in the distributed benchmark.
_param_help.seed: Random seed for point generation and query sampling.
_param_help.space_width: Width of the global 2D point space.
_param_help.space_height: Height of the global 2D point space.
_param_help.max_query_width: Maximum width of generated rectangle range queries.
_param_help.max_query_height: Maximum height of generated rectangle range queries.
